prompt: Hero has QcJd on AhsTc2d. How many outs improve hero to a straight on the turn?
why_v1: Only a king completes this gutshot straight draw, so there are 4 clean outs.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Only a king finishes this gutshot, so there are 4 outs.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This gutshot has only 4 outs because just one rank completes the straight.
recap_v1: Flush draws usually have 9 outs, open-ended straight draws usually have 8, and gutshots usually have 4.
